category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China export documentation against Peru (INACAL) technical requirements.

title.en: China-to-Peru Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Peru requirements: INACAL NTP safety and energy criteria, technical regulation (Reglamento Tecnico) compliance, MINEM energy labeling, MTPE occupational safety context, MTC radio homologation, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与秘鲁要求对照：INACAL NTP电气安全与能效要求、技术规章（Reglamento Tecnico）合规、MINEM能效标签、MTPE职业安全语境、MTC无线核准及当地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與秘魯要求對照：INACAL NTP電氣安全與能效要求、技術規章（Reglamento Tecnico）合規、MINEM能效標籤、MTPE職業安全語境、MTC無線核准及當地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters should verify current Peru requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商在出货或投放市场前应向合格专业人士核查当前秘鲁要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商在出貨或投放市場前應向合格專業人士核查當前秘魯要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerators entering Peru need target-market validation on several fronts: INACAL-adopted NTP safety and technical requirements, MINEM energy-labeling obligations where applicable, EMC and radio compliance where relevant, MTPE-aligned safety context, and a Peru-established importer of record handling Customs clearance at Callao. China CCC and GB 12021.2/GB 4706.13 are mandatory domestically but are not sufficient for Peru clearance. Peru does not apply EU-style RoHS, EU-style battery EPR, or an EU-style outdoor noise gate for standard refrigeration products.
answer_first.zh: 向秘鲁出口的中国家用冰箱在多个方面都需目标市场核验：INACAL采纳的NTP安全与技术要求、MINEM能效标签义务（适用产品）、相关电磁兼容与无线要求、MTPE安全语境，以及秘鲁本土进口商在卡亚俄港完成海关放行。中国的CCC、GB 12021.2及GB 4706.13仅为中国境内强制要求，不能替代秘鲁放行。秘鲁对标准家用冰箱并未执行欧盟式RoHS、欧盟式按化学类别电池EPR或户外噪声门槛。
answer_first.zht: 向秘魯出口的中國家用冰箱在多個方面都需目標市場核驗：INACAL採納的NTP安全與技術要求、MINEM能效標籤義務（適用產品）、相關電磁相容與無線要求、MTPE安全語境，以及秘魯本土進口商在卡亞俄港完成海關放行。中國的CCC、GB 12021.2及GB 4706.13僅為中國境內強制要求，不能替代秘魯放行。秘魯對標準家用冰箱並未執行歐盟式RoHS、歐盟式按化學種類電池EPR或戶外噪聲門檻。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or on material regulatory change affecting INACAL, PRODUCE, MINEM, MTPE, MTC, or SUNAT.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
